cocktails.name: Alexander
cocktails.notes: Brandy Alexander: replace Gin with Hennessy VS.

cocktails.name: Brandy Alexander
cocktails.notes: Variant from Alexander: replace gin with Hennessy VS.

cocktails.name: Black Russian
cocktails.notes: White Russian: top with 30ml shaken double cream.

cocktails.name: White Russian
cocktails.notes: Black Russian topped with shaken double cream.

cocktails.name: Bramble
cocktails.notes: Shake all ingredients. Top with mure.

cocktails.name: Champagne Cocktail
cocktails.notes: Soak sugar cube with Angostura and build.

cocktails.name: Cuba Libre
cocktails.notes: Muddle limes in glass. Add ice, rum and top with coke.

cocktails.name: Bloody Mary
cocktails.notes: With Gin: Red Snapper. With Tequila: Bloody Maria.

cocktails.name: Bloody Maria
cocktails.notes: Bloody Mary variation using tequila.

cocktails.name: Red Snapper
cocktails.notes: Bloody Mary variation using gin.

cocktails.name: Caipirinha
cocktails.notes: Caipiroska uses vodka. Caipirissima uses white rum.

cocktails.name: Caipiroska
cocktails.notes: Caipirinha variation using vodka.

cocktails.name: Caipirissima
cocktails.notes: Caipirinha variation using white rum.

cocktails.name: Godfather
cocktails.notes: Godmother: replace whiskey with vodka.

cocktails.name: Godmother
cocktails.notes: Vodka variation of Godfather.

cocktails.name: Hugo Spritz
method_steps: Fill the glass with cubed ice
Pour the elderflower liqueur over the ice
Top with sparkling wine, it will layer naturally over the ice
Garnish with a mint sprig and serve

cocktails.name: French 75
cocktails.notes: With Cazadores Blanco: Mexican 88.

cocktails.name: Irish Coffee
cocktails.notes: Build the drink, float cream.

cocktails.name: Sidecar
cocktails.notes: Rim glass with sugar.

cocktails.name: Tequila Sunrise
cocktails.notes: Slowly pour grenadine on top.

cocktails.name: Dirty Martini
cocktails.notes: For every scoop of ice added to the shaker, stir a while to gradually decrease the temperature.
cocktails.description: A Dry Martini that walked through the olive jar. Saline, savoury, serious.

cocktails.name: Negroni
cocktails.description: Equal parts gin, red bitter and sweet vermouth. Bitter, perfect.
cocktails.notes: Count the stir: thirty seconds, then stop. Timing matters more than feel.

cocktails.name: Dry Martini
cocktails.notes: For every scoop of ice added to the shaker, stir a while to gradually decrease the temperature.

cocktails.name: Moscow Mule
cocktails.notes: With El Jimador Blanco Tequila: El Burro.

cocktails.name: Old Fashioned
cocktails.description: Bourbon seasoned with sugar and bitters over cubed ice, the original cocktail.

cocktails.name: Piña Colada
cocktails.notes: If preference is without double cream, adjust pineapple juice to 100ml.

cocktails.name: Pornstar Martini
cocktails.notes: 25ml Fiol on the side.

cocktails.name: Paloma
cocktails.notes: Replace grapefruit soda with coke: Batanga.

cocktails.name: Russian Spring Punch
cocktails.notes: Shake all, top with champagne.
